meaning: n.断了奶的婴儿adj.刚断奶的
examples: Objective To study the effect of lead on the calcium absorption and bone development in weanling rats.
This study investigated the effects of glutamine on the growth performance and Immunity in early-weanling piglets.
The experiment compares the effect of EM with that of regular additives on weanling stress of early weanling piglets.
